payload.theme: Open Source as a Catalyst for Development in Emerging Markets
payload.description: The use of open source software is increasingly leveraged to address development priorities in emerging economies, highlighting a trend of technology democratization and collaborative innovation for social impact.

payload.theme: Integration and Standardization of AI Development Tools
payload.description: There is a movement towards creating unified, shared components and SDKs that power multiple AI-driven developer tools and experiences, improving efficiency and consistency across platforms.
